generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep America safe. Some politicians want to cut defense budgets, but that just puts our families at risk. We need strong alliances to deter threats before they reach our shores. Remember, freedom isn't free - it's paid for by the brave men and women who serve. #SupportOurAllies #NationalSecurityFirst
